meta.title: Learn Real Claude Code
meta.description: Study coding-agent harness design through a corrected progressive curriculum

home.hero_subtitle: A corrected Python curriculum for coding-agent harness design
home.core_pattern_desc: The loop is still model -> tool -> tool_result, but the surrounding runtime, state, and coordination layers matter just as much.
home.learning_path_desc: 12 sessions, from the minimal loop to task-bound isolation
home.layers_desc: Five concerns that keep the teaching harness honest
home.message_flow_desc: Watch how the teaching harness accumulates loop, state, and coordination features

sim_message.start_hint: Press Play or Step to begin

timeline.title: Learning Path
timeline.subtitle: s01 to s12: Corrected Harness Curriculum

layers.title: Architectural Layers
layers.subtitle: Five orthogonal concerns that keep the teaching harness honest
layers.tools: What the agent can do. Tools connect the model to the world.
layers.planning: How work is structured. Session guidance, delegation, skills, and durable tasks live here.
layers.memory: How the harness stays inside context limits without losing the plot.
layers.concurrency: How slow work continues without blocking the foreground loop.
layers.collaboration: How multiple workers share state, protocols, and isolation lanes.

compare.title: Compare Versions
compare.subtitle: See what changed between any two versions
compare.empty_hint: Select two versions above to compare them.

session_subtitles.s01: Close the model → tool → result loop first
session_subtitles.s02: Grow tools via Registry; keep the loop as-is
session_subtitles.s03: Session checklist, separate from on-disk tasks
session_subtitles.s04: Child loop: clean history vs summarized fork
session_subtitles.s05: Scan multiple dirs; activate skills by touched paths
session_subtitles.s08: Slow commands in threads; results re-injected
session_subtitles.s09: config + JSONL inbox; each runs its own loop
session_subtitles.s10: Shutdown and plan tables keyed by request id
session_subtitles.s11: before_request injects inbox or unclaimed work
session_subtitles.s12: Tasks bound to worktrees; events in jsonl

session_key_insights.s01: Without a loop, you paste every tool result back by hand
session_key_insights.s02: A stable loop grows by tool protocol, not rewriting `while`
session_key_insights.s03: Session todos steer this turn; s07 steers cross-session work
session_key_insights.s05: System lists active skills; bodies arrive via `tool_result`
session_key_insights.s06: Full context is normal — governance must be layered
session_key_insights.s07: On-disk tasks survive what chat compaction removes
session_key_insights.s08: Background work must become visible input on the next turn
session_key_insights.s10: Protocols are request ids + state, not vibes
session_key_insights.s11: Autonomy is often the harness injecting the next hint
session_key_insights.s12: Split control plane (tasks) from execution plane (directories)
